aesthetic.subject_world: A day in the life of a busy HR/admin officer in a Vietnamese office
aesthetic.audience: Vietnamese TikTok viewers: office workers, students curious about the HR profession
aesthetic.one_job: Show how packed an HR officer's day is, hour by hour, to earn a follow from people interested in the profession
aesthetic.tone: relatable, fast-paced, lightly humorous office energy
aesthetic.signature_device: An oversized digital clock chip that pops to each new hour, with a workday progress bar (08:00 to 17:00) filling along the bottom of the whole video
aesthetic.aesthetic_risk: Clock chips could read as static labels if the pop-in and progress bar motion are too subtle
aesthetic.anti_template_check: Rejected the generic numbered-listicle card sequence; replaced with a time-of-day clock device and a persistent day-progress bar that comes directly from the 'one busy day' subject

scenes.visual_focus: Stacked oversized type with a floating clock icon

copy: Núi email, đơn nghỉ phép chờ xử lý
scenes.visual_focus: Digital clock chip 08:00 pops in, envelope icon beside title, description card below
scenes.layout: clock chip center, description card below

copy: Lọc CV, hẹn lịch, phỏng vấn liên tục
scenes.visual_focus: Clock chip 09:30 high in frame, CV document icon, description card lower
scenes.layout: clock chip high, description card low

copy: Tính lương, bảo hiểm, hợp đồng lao động
scenes.visual_focus: Clock chip 13:30 centered, coin icon beside title, description card below
scenes.layout: clock chip center, description card below

copy: Lên lịch, đặt tiệc, trang trí văn phòng
Follow để hiểu nghề HR hơn
scenes.visual_focus: Clock chip 16:00, balloon icon, description card, CTA bar slides up near the end
scenes.layout: clock chip center, CTA bar bottom

layout_boxes.visual_box: center band y 560..1200 for clock chips and icons
layout_boxes.caption_box: bottom band reserved for burned SRT subtitles and the day progress bar (y 1780..1830)

background.rationale: dark navy channel-brand base, high contrast

muted.rationale: chips, progress bar track, secondary copy

accent_morning.rationale: cool morning blue, scene 08:00 and hook

motion_budget.moving_groups: scene inner container, clock chip, description card / CTA bar, day progress fill
motion_budget.meaning: the clock pop marks a new hour of the workday; the bottom bar filling is the day passing

scene_variation: hook is stacked type with floating clock icon; hour scenes alternate clock-chip vertical position (center / high / center / center) and accent color per hour; the final scene adds a CTA bar; the day progress bar persists across all scenes

audio.tts: Gemini TTS (gemini-2.5-flash-preview-tts, voice Rasalgethi), 5 clips mixed at scene offsets +0.25s
